name.description: Package name in kebab-case, WITHOUT the agent- prefix (e.g. 'budget', 'tool-registry'). The package becomes @adhd/agent-<name>.
name.x-prompt: What name for the registry package (without the agent- prefix)?

tablePrefix.description: SQLite table-name prefix for this package's tables (default: <name with - replaced by _>_). Enforces the no-cross-package-collision invariant.
